title: Ivanti security advisory (AV26-450)
description: On May 12, 2026, Ivanti published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM)  version 2024 SU5 and prior
Ivanti Virtual Traffic Manager (vTM)  version 22.9r3 and prior
Ivanti Secure Access Client (Windows)  version 22.8R5 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
